## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass
- [ ] `npm run smoke:esm` passes (packages still import under plain Node ESM)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] If an exported signature in `@llm-workbench/runtime` changed, it's called out above

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention, or follow-ups deferred to a later PR.
